questions.prompt: The community garden ______ open every Saturday morning.
We ______ tomatoes and beans in the small greenhouse.
There is ______ apple tree beside the tool shed.
My sister ______ got a new watering can.
The volunteers start work ______ nine o'clock.
Last spring we ______ fifty young trees along the river path.
The soil near the wall is ______ than the soil by the gate.
Next weekend the club ______ build a new greenhouse.
There aren't ______ tools left in the shed.
She ______ waters the herbs before she leaves for work.
I ______ at the garden since March, and I still enjoy every session.
If it rains tomorrow, we ______ the planting until Sunday.
If I had a bigger balcony, I ______ grow my own vegetables.
Last year a large water tank ______ behind the greenhouse.
Volunteers ______ wear gloves when they clear the thorny bushes.
They ______ for a small grant since the beginning of the year.
If we ______ the seeds earlier, we would have had a much bigger crop.
The coordinator said that the training ______ the following week.
The neighbour ______ fence borders the garden has offered to help us.
I wish I ______ more space for growing herbs in my flat.
By the time the rain started, the volunteers ______ already gone home.
Not only ______ the project won an award, but its membership had doubled as well.
If she had studied agriculture, she ______ an adviser to local farmers today.
______ impressed the judges most was the children's enthusiasm for composting.
You ______ have warned me the gate was locked — I waited half an hour in the rain!
Choose the word from the bank that has the same meaning as each word below.
Match each gardening word with its definition.

bank: decayed plant material that is added to the soil
a very young plant grown from a seed
the crop that is gathered at the end of a season
the top layer of earth in which plants grow
a wild plant growing where it is not wanted
a building made of glass for growing plants
a narrow path between rows of vegetables
a tool used for digging holes in the ground
a container in which cut flowers are sold
the season when the leaves fall from the trees

answers: decayed plant material that is added to the soil
a very young plant grown from a seed
the crop that is gathered at the end of a season
the top layer of earth in which plants grow
a wild plant growing where it is not wanted

questions.prompt: Choose the word from the bank that best completes each sentence.

items.text: Please ______ the young plants early in the morning, before the sun gets hot.
The club asks members to ______ glass and paper instead of throwing them away.
Several local families ______ spare seeds and tools to the project each spring.
More than thirty people ______ at the garden every weekend without being paid.
We usually ______ the beans in late August, when the pods are completely full.

questions.prompt: Choose the word from the bank that goes with each verb to make a common expression.
Match each word about the environment with the phrase that explains it.

bank: able to continue for a long time without damaging the environment
the variety of plant and animal life found in a place
a long period with little or no rain
an amount that is greater than what is needed
a chemical used to kill insects that damage crops
a machine that pumps water up from underground
a sudden rise in the price of fresh food
a spell of unusually cold weather in spring
the practice of growing crops without any soil
a payment made to farmers by the government

answers: able to continue for a long time without damaging the environment
the variety of plant and animal life found in a place
a long period with little or no rain
an amount that is greater than what is needed
a chemical used to kill insects that damage crops
